ipteunyeong.title: Work-Life Balance in Korean Corporate Culture
ipteunyeong.text: Work-life balance has become a hot topic in Korean corporate culture. Many companies are now implementing flexible working hours and remote work policies to help employees maintain a healthier lifestyle. In the past, staying late at the office was considered a virtue, showing dedication and loyalty to the company. However, the younger generation has different values and priorities. They seek meaningful work that allows them to pursue personal interests and spend quality time with family and friends. Some progressive companies have introduced a four-day work week or unlimited vacation policies. These changes are not just about employee satisfaction; they also boost productivity and creativity. When people are well-rested and motivated, they perform better at work. The pandemic accelerated these changes, proving that many tasks can be done effectively from home. As Korea continues to modernize its workplace culture, finding the right balance between professional success and personal fulfillment remains an ongoing challenge for both employers and employees.
ipteunyeong.korean_summary: 한국 기업 문화에서 워라밸이 중요한 화두가 되고 있습니다. 과거에는 야근이 미덕으로 여겨졌지만, 젊은 세대는 개인적 시간을 중시하며 일과 삶의 균형을 추구합니다. 일부 진보적 기업들이 4일 근무제나 무제한 휴가제를 도입하고 있으며, 이는 직원 만족도와 생산성 향상에 모두 도움이 됩니다.

gwitunyeong.title: Global AI Competition Intensifies
gwitunyeong.text: The global artificial intelligence race is reaching new heights as tech giants and nations compete for dominance in this transformative technology. OpenAI's ChatGPT has sparked a surge of innovation, prompting Google, Microsoft, and other major players to accelerate their AI development programs. Countries like the United States, China, and the European Union are investing billions of dollars in AI research and infrastructure. The competition extends beyond chatbots to include autonomous vehicles, medical diagnostics, and smart manufacturing systems. However, this rapid advancement raises important questions about job displacement, data privacy, and ethical AI use. Governments worldwide are scrambling to establish regulations that encourage innovation while protecting citizens' rights. The outcome of this AI arms race will likely determine economic leadership for decades to come, making it one of the most significant technological competitions in modern history.
gwitunyeong.korean_summary: 전 세계 AI 경쟁이 치열해지고 있으며, 주요 기업들과 국가들이 이 혁신적 기술의 주도권을 놓고 경쟁하고 있습니다. 미국, 중국, EU 등이 AI 연구에 수십억 달러를 투자하고 있으며, 이는 향후 수십 년간의 경제적 리더십을 결정할 중요한 경쟁입니다.

key_expressions.example: Remote work has become a hot topic in our company meetings.
The new office layout is designed to boost productivity and creativity.
I want to pursue personal interests while maintaining my career.
Managing stress is an ongoing challenge for many professionals.
The company's innovation is reaching new heights this quarter.
The new technology sparked a surge of innovation in the industry.
Companies are scrambling to establish new safety protocols.
This technology will determine economic leadership in the next decade.

today_sentences.english: We need to implement a more flexible working policy to retain top talent.
today_sentences.korean: 우수 인재를 유지하기 위해 더 유연한 근무 정책을 시행해야 합니다.

today_sentences.english: Our company is investing heavily in AI technology to stay competitive.
today_sentences.korean: 우리 회사는 경쟁력을 유지하기 위해 AI 기술에 막대한 투자를 하고 있습니다.

today_sentences.english: I'm trying to find a better work-life balance this year.
today_sentences.korean: 올해는 더 나은 워라밸을 찾으려고 노력하고 있어요.

quiz.korean: 워라밸이 우리 회사에서 뜨거운 화두가 되었습니다.
quiz.answer: Work-life balance has become a hot topic in our company.

quiz.korean: 이 새로운 기술은 업계에서 혁신의 급증을 촉발했습니다.
quiz.answer: This new technology sparked a surge of innovation in the industry.

quiz.korean: 정부들이 새로운 규제를 서둘러 구축하고 있습니다.
quiz.answer: Governments are scrambling to establish new regulations.

quiz.sentence: Many companies are now implementing ___ working hours to help employees.
quiz.korean: 많은 회사들이 직원들을 돕기 위해 유연한 근무시간을 시행하고 있습니다.

quiz.sentence: The AI competition is ___ new heights globally.
quiz.korean: AI 경쟁이 전 세계적으로 새로운 차원에 이르고 있습니다.

quiz.sentence: This technology will ___ economic leadership for decades.
quiz.korean: 이 기술은 수십 년간 경제적 주도권을 결정할 것입니다.
